contract.summary: 导航 UiMap 显式关系图来源

joins: uimap.ParentUiMapID 是 UiMap 表内显式父级关系
uimaplink.ParentUiMapID -> uimaplink.ChildUiMapID 是 UiMapLink 显式链接关系
where: 只导出数据库中已经存在的 UiMap 父子关系与 UiMapLink 关系
不使用矩形相交、采样、同父级推导或手写 id
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条来自 DB 显式字段的 UiMap 关系

relations.sql: WITH parent_relations AS (SELECT 'uimap_parent_' || CAST(child.ID AS TEXT) AS relation_key, 'uimap_parent' AS relation_source, CAST(child.ID AS INTEGER) AS source_row_id, CAST(child.ID AS INTEGER) AS from_ui_map_id, child.Name_lang AS from_name, CAST(child.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS to_ui_map_id, parent.Name_lang AS to_name, CAST(COALESCE(child.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS flags, CAST(COALESCE(child.VisibilityPlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(child.System, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_system, CAST(COALESCE(child.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_type, CAST(COALESCE(parent.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS to_type FROM uimap child LEFT JOIN uimap parent ON CAST(parent.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(child.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(child.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(child.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0), link_relations AS (SELECT 'uimaplink_' || CAST(link.ID AS TEXT) AS relation_key, 'uimaplink' AS relation_source, CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) AS source_row_id, CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS from_ui_map_id, parent.Name_lang AS from_name, CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) AS to_ui_map_id, child.Name_lang AS to_name, CAST(COALESCE(link.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS flags, CAST(COALESCE(link.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(parent.System, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_system, CAST(COALESCE(parent.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_type, CAST(COALESCE(child.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS to_type FROM uimaplink link LEFT JOIN uimap parent ON CAST(parent.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN uimap child ON CAST(child.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(link.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(link.ChildUiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0) SELECT * FROM parent_relations UNION ALL SELECT * FROM link_relations ORDER BY relation_source, from_ui_map_id, to_ui_map_id, source_row_id

joins: uimap 自连接补齐 from/to 名称
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 UiMap 显式关系

change_log.summary: 初始契约版本，仅导出 uimap.ParentUiMapID 与 uimaplink 显式关系；不生成推导邻接
